# Document Library Feature Pattern Study

This compatibility index keeps older bundled skill references resolvable.

Use the current document-library studies instead:

- `docs/studies/document-library-resource-structure.md`
- `docs/studies/document-library-generation-rules.md`
- `docs/studies/document-library-fields-views-forms.md`
- `docs/studies/document-library-v2-document-center-runtime.md`
- `docs/studies/doc-library-control-generation-rules.md`
- `docs/studies/doc-library-control-form-hosts-runtime.md`

Treat those study documents as the active source of truth. Keep runtime claims limited to the proof boundary recorded in the referenced runtime studies.
